## FormIR interface

> This API is provided as a beta preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.

The complete Canonical Intermediate Representation for a form.

Output of the Canonicalize phase; input to Validate, Generate (JSON Schema), and Generate (UI Schema) phases.

Serializable to JSON — no live compiler objects.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface FormIR
```
